acceptance_criteria.text: Operator exposes an authenticated retry endpoint and web Operator action for a specific refresh job.
proof: Backend lint route ownership check verifies the endpoint.
frontend/src/pages/dashboard/OperatorPage.tsx shows Повторить refresh for retryable jobs and sends confirm_retry=true.

acceptance_criteria.text: Retry is allowed only for failed/captcha/paused/warning reliability states and blocked for processing/non-retryable jobs.
proof: Retryable states are failed, captcha_required, paused, and warning.
Unit tests cover allowed failed jobs and blocked processing jobs.

acceptance_criteria.text: Paid retry requires explicit confirm_retry=true before reserving credits or creating a new parsequeue job.
proof: request_refresh_retry blocks with explicit_retry_confirmation_required unless confirm_retry=True.
API route passes confirm_retry from request payload.
Unit test covers the no-confirm block with no side effects.

acceptance_criteria.text: Confirmed retry uses the existing paid map refresh enqueue boundary and creates a new read-only job without mutating the old job.
proof: Unit test verifies the source failed queue is not updated and the new queued result comes from the paid enqueue boundary.
gaps: Live production retry was not executed to avoid creating a paid reservation/job on real data.

acceptance_criteria.text: Boundary evidence shows no provider writes, no direct Apify call, no customer messages, and no credit charge at request time.
proof: Service reports external_writes_performed=False, external_calls_performed=False, and credit_charged=False.
Lint guardrail rejects direct parsequeue mutation, direct Apify client use, direct message sends, and provider publish markers.
Chat response states the old failed job was not changed and map publication remains manual.

acceptance_criteria.text: Targeted tests, backend lint, frontend build, and diff check pass.
gaps: Full test suite was not run.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: python3 -m py_compile src/services/operator_refresh_retry.py src/services/operator_refresh_result.py src/services/telegram_dashboard.py src/api/operator_api.py src/worker.py

PYTHONPATH=src:. python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_operator_refresh_retry.py tests/test_operator_refresh_result.py tests/test_operator_map_refresh.py tests/test_operator_refresh_telegram_followup.py tests/test_worker_apify_settlement.py tests/test_telegram_dashboard_copy.py
known_gaps: No live production retry was triggered because it would create a paid reservation and a new parsequeue job.
Production route smoke will verify auth boundary after deploy without triggering a paid retry.
